cases.prompt: 작업 다 끝났어. 완료 리포트 HTML 보고서 하나 만들어줘

assertions.text: It produces a self-contained HTML report with inline CSS and inline SVG charts that needs no external dependencies or build step.
It writes the report in the user's language, which is Korean in this case.
It reads the actual system time and stamps the completion moment in the locale format (KST) rather than guessing.
It includes the what-was-done table and a results/metrics section using charts when numbers exist.

cases.prompt: /completion-report - generate a completion report for the UI work I just finished

assertions.text: It favors visuals such as tables, inline SVG bar/line/donut charts, and embedded screenshots or images over long text.
It includes visual evidence (screenshots or generated images) since this is design/UI work.
It saves the report to a reports/completion-<timestamp>.html path and tells the user where it is instead of only dumping the path.
